page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr7.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8369B processor. Operating at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz, this instance provides 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 128 vCPUs. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

The instance runs on the KVM hypervisor and features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. It does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Additionally, the instance does not feature any GPU acceleration, limiting its utility for workloads requiring hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel tensor processing.

Given its high memory density of 1024.0 GB RAM alongside 128 dedicated physical cores, this instance offers high resource density for memory-bound enterprise applications. The qualitative cost efficiency is centered on its large memory footprint and dedicated CPU allocation, which eliminates resource contention. This profile is suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture and the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory ratio. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware configuration is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, data analytics pipelines, and enterprise resource planning systems that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and high memory capacity without the need for local storage or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB RAM, 64 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage, running on the KVM hypervisor.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmr7.32xlarge features 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores at 2.9 GHz
1024.0 GB of system memory with an 8.0 GB per core ratio
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on KVM hypervisor
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise applications
